## Cancel

`POST /sign_requests/{sign_request_id}/cancel`

| Parameter | In | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|---|
| `sign_request_id` | path | `string` | yes |

**Request body** (`application/json`): `SignRequestCancelRequest`

**Returns:** `SignRequest`

**Example**

```go
result, err := client.SignRequests.Cancel(context.Background(), "SIGN_REQUEST_ID", &schemas.SignRequestCancelRequest{})
if err != nil {
	log.Fatal(err)
}
fmt.Println(result)
```
